nameMeanings.name: LeFleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of Fleming with definite article le.

variants.name: Fleming
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When George LeFleming was born in 1476, in Stephenstown, County Meath, Ireland, his father, James Fleming 7th Baron Slane, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth Welles, was 36. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Ellice Butler. He died in 1593, at the age of 117.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George LeFleming est né en 1476, à Stephenstown, County Meath, Irlande, son père, James Fleming 7th Baron Slane, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Welles, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Ellice Butler. Il est décédé en 1593, à l’âge de 117 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als George LeFleming 1476 in Stephenstown, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Fleming 7th Baron Slane 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Welles 36. Er hatte mit Ellice Butler mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1593 im Alter von 117 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George LeFleming è nato il nel 1476 nel Stephenstown, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, James Fleming 7th Baron Slane, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Welles, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Ellice Butler. Morì nel 1593, all'età di 117 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: George LeFleming(이)가 1476년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 스테프스타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Fleming 7th Baron Slane(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Welles(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Ellice Butler(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1593년 117세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George LeFleming nasceu em 1476, em Stephenstown, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, James Fleming 7th Baron Slane, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Welles, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Ellice Butler. Ele faleceu em 1593, com 117 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George LeFleming родился в 1476 г. в местности стифенстоун, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени James Fleming 7th Baron Slane было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Welles, 36. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Ellice Butler. Он умер в 1593 г. в возрасте 117 лет.
